variants: Verner Krogh is an accomplished inventor in the field of counseling psychology, best known for his creation, the Nimbus Flow Regulator. He developed this innovative device under the mentorship of Augusto Andrade, gaining significant expertise in therapeutic techniques. In addition to his professional achievements, Verner is a dedicated member of the Labyrinthine Gamemasters Guild, where he nurtures his passion for gaming. His groundbreaking research is supported financially by the Shearwater Ascent Trust, which provides him with the necessary funding to explore new avenues within his field.
